title: RTGS Files Missing
symptoms: treasury department reporting missing RTGS files
files not generated in expected folders
checks: check RTGS backup folders on servers 1.112 and 1.113
verify IDC RTGS file generation jobs
likely_causes: IDC EOD issues affecting file generation
recommended_actions: check backup folders for missing files
engage Database Administrators if files not generated
notes: files must be in PaymentsToSTPLink folder on server 0.45
backup procedures must be followed before mounting
